docs.title: Authentication & OAuth
docs.summary: OAuth 2.0 authentication flows for RingCentral: JWT for server apps, Auth Code + PKCE for user-facing apps with multiple users and per-user tokens. Includes grant_type values, token exchange, refresh tokens, reuse access tokens guidance, and SDK examples in Python, JS, PHP.

docs.title: Rate Limits
docs.summary: Rate limit groups (Light/Medium/Heavy/Auth — 5 req/min for Auth), response headers (X-Rate-Limit-Remaining, Retry-After), reset the clock behavior on 429, and correct handling to avoid rate limit errors. Auth group: reuse access tokens.

docs.title: Webhooks & Event Subscriptions
docs.summary: Creating webhook and WebSocket subscriptions (POST /restapi/v1.0/subscription), event filters, validation token handshake (3000ms timeout, 1024 byte limit), deliveryMode, renewal, and troubleshooting. Python Flask handler example.

docs.title: API Basics — URLs, Paths, Pagination
docs.summary: Production and sandbox base URLs, path shortcuts using tilde (~), key resource paths, pagination with page/perPage/navigation/nextPage, HTTP methods, common query parameters, and error codes.

docs.title: SDKs — Installation & Quick Start
docs.summary: Installation and quick-start for all RingCentral SDKs: Python (pip3), JS/Node (npm), PHP, Ruby, Java, Go, .NET. Chatbot framework (ringcentral-chatbot-js): higher-level wrapper over @ringcentral/sdk with skill routing. Python pagination example with nextPage and navigation object.

docs.title: Voice — Call Log, RingOut, Call Control
docs.summary: Call log API (GET /restapi/v1.0/account/~/extension/~/call-log), RingOut for outbound calls, call control operations (record/mute/hold/transfer), WebRTC setup, presence API, and URI scheme for click-to-dial.

docs.title: Messaging — SMS, Fax, MMS, Voicemail
docs.summary: Sending and receiving SMS/MMS (POST /restapi/v1.0/account/~/extension/~/sms), A2P high-volume SMS batches, fax sending/receiving, voicemail, and message-store filtering.

docs.title: Team Messaging (Glip) — Bots, Posts, Adaptive Cards
docs.summary: RingCentral Team Messaging (Glip) API: bots (require Bot app type), posts, adaptive cards, groups/chats/teams. ringcentral-chatbot-js framework for skill routing. Key endpoints: /restapi/v1.0/glip/posts, /glip/groups.

docs.title: Business Analytics — Call Aggregation & Timeline
docs.summary: Business Analytics API: POST /analytics/calls/v1/accounts/~/aggregation/fetch for aggregate call metrics and POST /analytics/calls/v1/accounts/~/timeline/fetch for time-series data. Supports groupBy dimensions (Users, Queues, IVR), filters, and response options.

docs.title: AI APIs — Speech-to-Text, Transcription, ACE
docs.summary: RingCentral AI APIs: speech-to-text (POST /ai/audio/v1/async/speech-to-text), async job pattern (submit → poll GET /ai/status/v1/jobs/{jobId} until Completed), ACE (AI Conversation Expert) for interaction analytics, speaker diarization, and text summarization.

docs.title: Webinar API — Creating and Managing Webinars
docs.summary: Webinar API for creating webinars and sessions (POST /webinar/v1/...), inviting panelists and co-hosts, managing registrants, configuring settings (recording, registration, Q&A), and subscribing to webinar events.

docs.title: Video API — Meeting Bridges
docs.summary: RingCentral Video REST API for creating and managing meeting bridges. Key endpoints: GET /rcvideo/v2/bridges/, POST /rcvideo/v2/bridges/. Bridge types: Instant (PMI), Scheduled, Default. Security: host PIN, participant PIN.

docs.title: Account API — Extensions, Phone Numbers, Directory
docs.summary: Account management: listing/creating extensions (POST /restapi/v1.0/account/{accountId}/extension), phone number assignment, presence status, directory entries (GET /restapi/v1.0/account/~/directory/entries), and address book for internal and external contacts.
